name: Clerestory brake carriage
bio: This brake carriage is designed for use with clerestory carriages. It can carry parcels and mail.
additional_text: {BLACK}Length: {GOLD}0.6 tiles{}{SILVER}This brake carriage is designed for use with clerestory carriages. It can carry parcels and mail.

name: Brake carriage
bio: Brake carriages continued to be a fixture of passenger trains during the steam era, carrying bulky luggage and parcels.
